questionText: Does your organization consume fuels as feedstocks for chemical production activities?
questionKo: 귀사 연료 원료 화학 생산 활동?
simpleHelp: Consumption of energy as feedstock is unique to chemical sector. A large share of fuels used by the sector is not combusted but is consumed as raw material. The information requested in this and the following question provides transparency on the level of fuel feedstocks consumed by your organization.

guidance.text:
General 
Select "Yes" if your organization consumes any types of fuels - fossil fuels (e.g. oil or natural gas) or renewable sources such as biomass - as feedstocks for the production of chemicals, regardless of whether the feedstock is purchased or produced by the organization.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 해당 문항에서 CDP가 요청하는 작성 내용을 설명합니다. 응답방법, 열 구조, 드롭다운 선택지를 기준으로 보고연도와 조직 범위에 맞는 정보를 입력하십시오.

guidance.text: Feedstocks : Feedstocks are starting materials, ranging from fossil fuels to biomass-based resources. These materials are fed into a process, and converted into other commodities or resources, which are either used directly or further transformed. For example, in the steel industry, coking coal is converted to coke, which is used in the steel production. In the petrochemical industry, gaseous feedstocks (ethane, propane, or butane) are used to produce high value chemicals.
guidance.textKo: 이 섹션은 문항에서 사용하는 주요 용어의 의미를 설명합니다. 용어 해석은 CDP 2026 원문과 국문 양식의 용어 사용을 우선 적용하십시오.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option selected - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected - 0/8 points
A maximum of 0/8 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 하나 이상 선택지 선택됨 - 2 점 이 경로에서 최대 2/2점을 받을 수 있습니다. 또는 비공개 경로 선택지 아님 선택됨 - 0/8 점 이 경로에서 최대 0/8점을 받을 수 있습니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option selected - 0/0 points
A maximum of 0/0 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Option NOT selected - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
